Hero Page.HEADLINE: We build it. You run it.
Hero Page.SUBHEADLINE:
You have the vision for your cold chain facility.
Crystal has the engineering expertise, procurement network, and construction capability to build it, on time, on spec, and ready to operate.

S1 What is EPC?.HEADLINE: Full project delivery. From design to handover.
S1 What is EPC?.BODY:
Crystal's EPC service covers the complete lifecycle of cold chain construction: engineering design, equipment procurement, and construction management.
We deliver a fully commissioned facility and hand it over ready to operate.
You bring the operator; we bring the infrastructure.

S2 Our EPC scope.Engineering: Cold room design, structural engineering, MEP, refrigeration system design, energy modelling. Built to GFSI, pharma GMP, and food safety standards.
S2 Our EPC scope.Procurement: Refrigeration equipment, racking systems, dock levellers, WMS hardware: sourced from approved vendors at competitive rates through our established procurement network.
S2 Our EPC scope.Construction: Civil construction, insulated panel installation, refrigeration commissioning, electrical and utility connections: project-managed end-to-end by Crystal.
S2 Our EPC scope.Handover: Digital HOTO, SOPs, staff training, systems documentation, and regulatory sign-off. Your facility is handed over fully commissioned and audit-ready.

S3 Why Crystal for EPC.BODY:
Crystal brings something most EPC contractors cannot: we've operated cold chain facilities ourselves.
We know what a 3am breakdown looks like, what an audit demands, and what a 10,000-pallet throughput day requires.
That operational knowledge is baked into every facility we build.
